title: MD
biography: Henry Marsh is a British neurosurgeon and author known for pioneering awake craniotomy in Ukraine and for his bestselling memoir Do No Harm. He brought modern neurosurgical techniques to underserved regions.
aiSummary: Henry Marsh is a neurosurgery specialist at St George's Hospital. Based in London.
